shortDescription: "A method with void return type can return a value"
shortCorrection: "A method with void return type cannot return a value"

    name: "Void function returns value"

A method that has the return type `void` can contain a return statement that returns a value.

frontmatter.shortDescription: A method with void return type can return a value
frontmatter.shortCorrection: A method with void return type cannot return a value
